name: 11L VRL + Full GPTQ + LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Batched LoRA TTT (ADIITJ)
author: Atharva Date
blurb: 11L VRL (Value Residual Learning, arxiv:2410.17897) + Full GPTQ (Hessian Cholesky int6) + LeakyReLU(0.5)² + EMA(0.997) + Tight SWA + Late QAT@0.15 + XSA-all(11) + Partial RoPE(16/64) + LN Scale + VE128(layers 9,10) + SmearGate + BigramHash(2048) + Prune(2%). Batched LoRA TTT at eval: rank=8 on Q+V+LMhead all 11 layers, 2 epochs/doc, cosine LR 0.01→~0, chunk=256, batch=64. Score-before-train every chunk every epoch (backward-looking, fully legal). Attribution: signalrush (PR #414), gowtham0992 (PR #569 VRL+FullGPTQ), MatoTeziTanka (PR #512 PROTEUS v7 TTT), LoquiAuris (PR #548 TTT).
